subject: Contract sign-off needed by Friday
snippet: Hi, we need your signed approval on the renewal contract before Friday or the new rates lapse.
bodyText:
Hi,

Our legal team finalised the renewal contract. We need your signed approval before Friday, otherwise the agreed rates lapse and we restart negotiations. Could you review the attached terms and confirm sign-off? This is time sensitive.

Thanks,
Jane

subject: URGENT: Q2 budget approval blocked - vendor payment
snippet: The vendor payment is blocked pending your approval. Please approve today so we don't miss the invoice deadline.
bodyText: The Q2 vendor payment is blocked pending your approval in the finance portal. The invoice is overdue and we risk a late penalty. Please approve today. Let me know if you need anything.

subject: Can you review the design doc?
snippet: When you get a chance, could you review the design doc and leave comments? No rush, sometime this week.
bodyText:
Hey,

When you get a chance, could you review the design doc and leave comments? Would love your take on the data model section. Sometime this week is fine.

Thanks!

subject: Reschedule our 1:1 - your availability?
snippet: Can we move our 1:1 to Thursday? Let me know what time works on your calendar.
bodyText: Hi, something came up and I need to reschedule our 1:1. Are you available Thursday afternoon? Let me know a time that works and I'll send a calendar invite.

subject: Re: ticket #4821 - we'll get back to you
snippet: Thanks for the details. Our engineering team is investigating and we'll get back to you within 2 business days.
bodyText: Thanks for the additional details on ticket #4821. Our engineering team is now investigating the issue and we will get back to you within 2 business days with an update. No action needed from you for now.

subject: 5 pages were updated in your space this week
snippet: Here is a summary of recent activity in the Engineering space.
bodyText: Weekly digest: 5 pages were updated in the Engineering space. View the changes in Confluence.

subject: 🔥 50% off all courses this weekend only!
snippet: Huge sale! Save 50% on every course. Limited time offer, don't miss out!
bodyText: Our biggest sale of the year! 50% off all courses this weekend only. Use code SAVE50 at checkout. Unsubscribe anytime.

subject: FYI - notes from yesterday's standup
snippet: Sharing the standup notes for visibility. Nothing needed from you.
bodyText: Sharing yesterday's standup notes for visibility. We covered the release timeline and the on-call rotation. Nothing needed from you, just keeping you in the loop.

subject: Exciting opportunity for a Senior Engineer
snippet: I came across your profile and have a role that could be a great fit. Open to a quick chat?
bodyText: Hi, I came across your profile and have a Senior Engineer role that could be a great fit. Would you be open to a quick chat this week? Happy to share details.

subject: NDA requires your signature before 2026-06-20
snippet: Please review and sign the attached NDA before 2026-06-20 so we can proceed with the partnership.
bodyText: Counsel here. Please review and sign the attached mutual NDA before 2026-06-20 so we can proceed with the partnership discussions. Let me know if you have any questions on the terms.
